'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/UKThreatLevel/UKThreatLevel.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=_txrPUrpm44mDWahVTy3_vXgAerW441CWy7xYY0tJaA-1774004727-1.0.1.1-5vNwza_ab5VPQc1rxOAxcl6IDQNYMD7OXvlAKedgOZc"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
